place: Pantai Lima, Pererenan, Mengwi, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Beachfront Five-Bedroom Ocean-View Villa with Spa Room, Pantai Lima - Canggu
blurb: A five-bedroom beachfront villa on the water's edge at Pantai Lima — open ocean-view living over three levels, a spa room with daybed terrace, a basement gym and study, and direct steps to the black-sand beach, fully staffed with a private chef.
detail:
This villa sits right on the water's edge within a four-acre beachfront estate, a five-bedroom retreat arranged across three levels. The ground floor opens to indoor and outdoor living areas, two bedrooms, the kitchen, pool and a garden-side outdoor dining area; the second floor holds three further bedrooms including the master, plus a spa room with an open terrace and daybeds; and the basement adds an office/study and a fitness area.

The open indoor living area frames a beautiful ocean view, with an enclosed air-conditioned dining room beside the kitchen and generous poolside seating overlooking the sea. Each en-suite bedroom is air-conditioned with its own satellite TV, and the villa is well stocked for downtime with a Harman Kardon sound system, table tennis, backgammon and a library of books, games and puzzles.

Fully staffed with a private chef, attendants, gardener and security, the villa includes daily breakfast, a complimentary car with driver, and shared access to the estate's night-lit tennis court. In-villa massage, yoga on the villa's own mats, and a full slate of tours and activities can be arranged on request — a serene beachfront base a minute from the sand.
